$schema: Exceptions file for guards/check-security.ts. Each exception needs reason, reviewer, and expiry (max ~30 days).

exceptions.reason: Transitive dev dependency via Vite/Astro (kumiko-platform docs/marketing). Windows dev-server file-read advisory only — Kumiko CI/prod runs macOS/Linux; dev tooling not exposed publicly. Tracked for upstream bump to esbuild >=0.28.1.
